title: Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to plan
summary_full: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.
summary_public: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.
